biological_sampling_unit: One naturally diploid biological individual; two homologs from that individual
preferred_samples: 2-3 independently processed individuals per population for replication, not pooled as one inference
exact_input_representation: Whole-genome diploid consensus/PSMCFA encoding heterozygous bins plus an exact-reference callable BED/mask; alternatively validated diploid VCF plus reference and callable mask converted without treating absent sparse-VCF sites as invariant
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Prefer raw reads or a validated same-individual diploid callset; pilot target >=15x autosomal median depth with depth/quality filters and downsampling-based heterozygote-FNR check; assembly haplotypes alone fail this contract
reference_identity_and_masks: Every allele, mask interval, and contig dictionary must resolve to the identical versioned reference; exclude sex chromosomes, organelles, low-mappability, repeats if not callable, contamination, collapsed/duplicated sequence, and abnormal depth
phasing_and_polarization: Phasing not required; both alleles must be retained in diploid genotype/consensus; no polarization required
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Sequentially Markov coalescent approximation; model/pilot must record rho/theta convention and recombination treatment; neutral mutation process and panmixia are working approximations; linked selection/structure can mimic size change
primary_estimand: Piecewise pairwise coalescent-rate or inverse-rate history for the two homologs, not a direct census history
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Retain theta0, t_k, lambda_k, d_k=2*mu*T_k, and theta_k=4*N_k*mu; diploid absolute convention N0=theta0/(4*mu*s), T_k=2*N0*t_k generations, N_k=N0*lambda_k; years=T_k*g; propagate mu and g distributions
time_window_resolution: Ancient/intermediate history; weak very-recent resolution and poor extreme-deep resolution; empirical usable window must be simulation-calibrated per genome, coverage, and parameterization
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: From validated callset: 2-8 CPU, 8-16 GiB, 1-6 h, 5-30 GiB scratch, <2 GiB persistent per individual including 100 bootstraps; raw-read mapping/calling separately 16 CPU, 32-64 GiB, 12-48 h, 50-300 GiB scratch; estimates are planning bounds
software_guix_provenance: New method-specific Guix manifest required: pinned lh3/psmc source commit/tag plus samtools/bcftools/htslib and conversion scripts; extend, do not mutate, recorded baseline channels commit 44bbfc24e4bcc48d0e3343cd3d83452721af8c36; record derivations, closure, store paths, commands, and hashes
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Low coverage/heterozygote dropout; false heterozygotes; unmasked inaccessible sequence; assembly collapse/duplication; reference bias; contamination; inbreeding/structure/admixture/selection misread as Ne(t); unstable bins; bootstrap noncoverage
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: 0 frozen method-valid vertebrate inputs in repository; the 40 reported paired/annotated VGP rows are not callable diploid genotypes
planning_eligible_range: Pilot 4-6 species; reviewed wave 10-20; catalog ceiling <=40 only after row-level raw-read/same-individual/callability proof
independence_from_pi_response: No when derived from the same sequence observations as analyzed pi; it is a shared-data genomic outcome
allowed_role: Descriptive scaled-history shape, replication/QC, clustering, non-causal decomposition, and prespecified shared-data sensitivity only

biological_sampling_unit: Accurately phased homologous haplotypes from one or more diploid individuals sampled from defined population(s)
minimum_samples: 2 haplotypes for a within-individual pairwise run; 4 haplotypes for a minimally informative multi-haplotype/cross-population comparison
preferred_samples: 4-8 phased haplotypes (2-4 individuals) per population, balanced between populations; larger sets require pair-index and computational design
exact_input_representation: Per-contig MSMC multihetsep files generated from phased, biallelic, exact-reference VCFs, with sample-specific callable masks and a reference mappability mask; explicit haplotype order and pair indices
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Validated diploid genotypes from raw reads or deposited callsets; pilot target >=15-20x for novel calling; report genotype error, missingness, phase-block N50, switch error and callable span per haplotype
reference_identity_and_masks: Identical versioned reference/coordinate dictionary across all VCFs and masks; sample-specific and common/reference masks intersected and hashed; no liftover in primary input
phasing_and_polarization: Accurate long-range phase is required for pairs across individuals; statistical phase must have switch-error validation; unphased within-individual pairs may be restricted with pair indices but do not become multi-individual phased data; no polarization required for core coalescence rates
recombination_mutation_assumptions: SMC approximation and recorded initial/fixed rho/mu; assumes modeled recombination and mutation process; population structure, introgression and selection confound inverse-coalescence interpretation
primary_estimand: Within- and cross-population pairwise coalescence-rate histories; relative cross-coalescence rate derived from specified within/cross runs
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Retain time boundaries and coalescence-rate/lambda summaries in mutation/coalescent scale; absolute generations/Ne require exact MSMC2 convention, autosomal diploidy, mu, and any rho assumption; years additionally require g; never label relative cross-coalescence as a literal split date without model caveat
time_window_resolution: More recent resolution than PSMC with more haplotypes but weak at the very recent and very deep ends; usable interval depends on sample count, phase error and time segmentation
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: Prepared input/inference: 8-32 CPU, 16-64 GiB, 6-48 h, 10-100 GiB scratch, 1-10 GiB persistent per comparison with bootstraps; phasing prep may require 8-32 CPU, 32-128 GiB, 12-72 h and 0.5-2x VCF size
software_guix_provenance: New Guix manifest with pinned stschiff/msmc2 and msmc-tools commits, D compiler, GSL, bcftools/htslib and chosen phaser; legacy MSMC binary is prohibited as a substitute; record phase software/model/reference panel and all store paths
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Switch errors; short phase blocks; genotype/mask/reference mismatch; unbalanced or mislabeled populations; cryptic relatedness; admixture; sparse contigs; too many haplotypes/pairs; nonconvergence; treating RCCR threshold as identified split time
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: 0 frozen method-valid vertebrate inputs; deposited H1/H2 pairs have not passed genotype, phase, mask, and same-individual gates
planning_eligible_range: Pilot 2-4 species; reviewed wave 4-10; no defensible catalog ceiling until phase/raw-read inventory
independence_from_pi_response: No when using the same diversity-bearing genotypes as pi
allowed_role: Descriptive within/cross history, temporal-shape comparison, method validation, and explicitly non-independent sensitivity

biological_sampling_unit: Multiple diploid individuals sampled from the same defined population; two-population split mode requires separately assigned samples from each population and selected distinguished lineage pairs
minimum_samples: 2 diploid samples is software-possible for a single population, but not a vertebrate-wide design target
preferred_samples: 10-20 unrelated diploid individuals per population when available; evaluate 2-10 distinguished individuals/composites as documented; balance two-population designs
exact_input_representation: Indexed biallelic diploid VCF/BCF or equivalent converted to per-contig SMC++ files; exact-reference FASTA/dictionary, explicit sample/population lists, global BED missing mask plus sample-level missing genotypes; distinguished pair(s) encoded
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Prefer validated pre-called all-sites/gVCF or sparse VCF plus exact cohort callable mask; pilot target >=10-15x for novel calling, >=90% individuals callable at retained site, genotype error/missingness audit; never infer invariants from absent sparse-VCF records
reference_identity_and_masks: All genotypes and masks on the identical versioned reference; vcf2smc ignores FILTER/QUAL and assumes absent sites invariant unless masked, so upstream filtering and mask construction are mandatory
phasing_and_polarization: Core population-history estimate accepts unphased diploid genotypes; for unphased data a distinguished pair must be the two alleles of one individual; cross-individual distinguished lineages require meaningful phase; default folded/uncertain polarization is allowed, whereas --unfold requires validated ancestral alleles/outgroup
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Combines conditional SFS and linkage under SMC approximation; estimate requires per-generation mu; record rho, regularization, knots/timepoints, thinning and composite-likelihood assumptions; panmixia/neutrality are approximations
primary_estimand: Regularized population-size history; selected split mode fits a clean two-population split model after marginal histories
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Preserve model's native/scaled parameters and exact supplied mu; absolute Ne/generations are conditional on that mu and software convention; calendar years require g; rho conversion/recombination interpretation separately recorded
time_window_resolution: Improves recent history relative to small-sample SMC methods, but very recent estimates remain sensitive to sample size, ROH, masks, regularization and structure; split is a clean-split estimand, not general gene-flow history
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 8-32 CPU, 64-256 GiB, 12-96 h, scratch 0.5-2x compressed VCF plus 20-100 GiB intermediates, persistent 2-20 GiB per population/model; memory/length scaling requires measured pilot
software_guix_provenance: New Guix manifest with content-pinned popgenmethods/smcpp source/image ingredients, Python/C++/GMP/MPFR/GSL and bcftools/htslib; Docker latest is forbidden; record patches, derivation, closure and model JSON hashes
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Unmasked missing sequence appears as ROH/crash; reference assumed ancestral by vcf2smc; ignored FILTER/QUAL; bad sample assignments; relatives; structure/admixture; regularization sensitivity; optimizer instability; memory excess; clean-split misspecification
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: 0 frozen vertebrate population tuples; repository's 2 accepted 20-sample tuples are Anopheles coluzzii and out of target; eight surveyed vertebrate model anchors are candidates only
planning_eligible_range: Pilot 4-6 species/populations; reviewed wave 8-15 species if frozen all-sites/callability tuples exist
independence_from_pi_response: No when based on the same cohort/genomic sites as pi
allowed_role: Secondary descriptive histories, recent-shape comparison, population-QC, and shared-data sensitivity; never primary independent covariate

biological_sampling_unit: One contemporaneous, geographically and temporally defined population sample of unrelated diploid individuals
minimum_samples: Software estimators can run with small samples, but <25 individuals is normally screening-only
preferred_samples: >=50 individuals, preferably >=100 when Ne is large; power simulations must set locus count, MAF threshold and true-Ne range
exact_input_representation: Filtered diploid multilocus genotypes plus sample metadata; independent/unlinked marker set or chromosome/recombination map; missingness/MAF/LD-pruning decisions; optional replicate estimators
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: High-quality genotypes; low-pass data only with validated genotype likelihood/calling method; record per-sample depth and error; avoid loci under selection and physical linkage unless modeled
reference_identity_and_masks: Exact reference/map version and chromosome assignment; callable mask and ascertainment frame recorded even when estimator consumes only markers
phasing_and_polarization: Usually unphased; no ancestral polarization; pedigree/relatedness screening required
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Random mating, effectively closed population, discrete or explicitly modeled generations, neutral loci, accounted physical linkage, random sampling; migration, age structure and overlapping generations can bias estimate
primary_estimand: Contemporary linkage-disequilibrium effective size, N_eLD, or effective number of breeders N_b for a cohort; vocabulary must say which
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Usually absolute individuals under estimator assumptions, with parametric/jackknife CI; no mu scaling; conversion N_b to N_e requires a separate demographic model and uncertainty
time_window_resolution: Approximately parental generation(s) represented by sampled cohort; not long-term coalescent Ne
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 1-8 CPU, 8-64 GiB, 0.5-12 h, 5-50 GiB scratch and <5 GiB persistent per population after marker pruning; pairwise-locus explosion must be benchmarked
software_guix_provenance: Pinned Guix package for NeEstimator v2 or selected open implementation plus PLINK/bcftools; exact version/license and source hash; simulator package pinned for power checks
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Small n/large Ne gives infinite or one-sided estimates; physical linkage; relatives; mixture/Wahlund effect; migration; overlapping generations; nonrandom age/sex sampling; MAF/ascertainment sensitivity
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: No vertebrate LD-Ne record inventory exists locally
planning_eligible_range: Literature pilot 10-20 species; genotype reanalysis pilot 3-5; expansion 20-60 records if provenance passes
independence_from_pi_response: Yes only when genotypes/loci/samples are independent of response pi and the response dataset did not determine inclusion/filtering; otherwise partially/shared-data
allowed_role: Eligible secondary predictor with measurement error; primary only under demonstrable data independence and temporal/population alignment

biological_sampling_unit: Same population sampled at two or more dated timepoints, ideally matched cohorts/life stages
preferred_samples: >=50 individuals per timepoint, >=2-3 generation spacing where feasible, multiple timepoints/replicates and hundreds-thousands neutral loci
exact_input_representation: Allele counts/genotypes at matched loci, dates, cohort/age metadata, sampling plan, population boundary, migration records and genotype-error model
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Consistent assay/calling across dates; coverage and batch effects audited; ancient/historical samples require damage and missingness model
reference_identity_and_masks: Exact marker/reference harmonization across time; common callable/ascertainment frame
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Drift model conditional on sampling plan; discrete generations or an explicit age-structured/overlapping-generation correction; migration, selection and census change modeled or excluded
primary_estimand: Variance effective size over the sampling interval, N_eV; sometimes N_b for cohort comparisons
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Absolute individuals with estimator interval after sampling correction; no mu scaling; report generation interval and whether Plan I/II or age-structured model used
time_window_resolution: Exactly the dated interval, expressed in generations and calendar dates; not ancient history
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 1-8 CPU, 8-32 GiB, 1-12 h, 5-30 GiB scratch, <5 GiB persistent; bootstrap/simulation power multiplier 100-1000
software_guix_provenance: Pinned Guix package for selected temporal estimator and simulator; record formulas/options and source revision even for custom R/Python implementation
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Insufficient drift signal; batch effects; changing marker panel; migration; selection; nonmatching population; overlapping generations; age/sex bias; temporal interval mismeasured
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: No frozen vertebrate temporal-Ne inputs locally
planning_eligible_range: Literature pilot 10-20 species; raw reanalysis 2-4 truth cases; expansion 15-40 records
independence_from_pi_response: Yes when time-series samples and loci are independent of pi response; shared individuals/sites make it partially dependent
allowed_role: Strong secondary independent demographic covariate when aligned; never merge with LD, inbreeding or long-term Ne

biological_sampling_unit: Known pedigrees across breeding individuals, or one cohort of offspring with multilocus parentage/sibship genotypes
minimum_samples: One complete breeding interval/cohort; estimator-specific minimum families
preferred_samples: Near-complete pedigree or >=100 offspring and dense independent markers; design-specific power simulation
exact_input_representation: Pedigree table or offspring genotypes with sex, cohort, parent candidates, missing parents, reproductive success and error rates
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Marker error/allelic dropout audited; enough loci to resolve sibships; sample coverage across breeders and offspring quantified
reference_identity_and_masks: Reference matters for genomic markers but estimand is family assignment; record assay/reference and callable/ascertainment frame
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Correct parentage/sibship model, mating system, sex ratio, missing-parent sampling, closed cohort and representative offspring; domestication/captive management flagged
primary_estimand: Pedigree inbreeding/variance effective size or cohort effective number of breeders N_b; exact definition required
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Absolute individuals with likelihood/credible interval; N_b-to-N_e or captive-to-wild transfer prohibited without explicit model/scenario
time_window_resolution: One or several recorded breeding seasons/generations
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 8-64 CPU, 16-128 GiB, 2-72 h, 10-100 GiB scratch depending on candidate parents/markers; <10 GiB persistent summaries
software_guix_provenance: Pinned COLONY or open alternative subject to license/package review; custom pedigree calculations pinned and tested; Guix source hashes and deterministic seeds
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Unsampled parents; genotyping error; overlapping cohorts; polygamy/model misspecification; close relatives; captive/wild mismatch; nonrepresentative offspring; N_b mislabeled N_e
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: No frozen vertebrate pedigree-Ne inventory locally
planning_eligible_range: Literature pilot 10-20 species; reanalysis 2-5 truth cases; expansion 15-40 records
independence_from_pi_response: Yes when pedigree/cohort evidence is independent of response pi
allowed_role: High-value secondary covariate for contemporary breeding demography; population/date specific

biological_sampling_unit: Multiple diploid individuals from one or more explicitly defined populations
minimum_samples: At least 2 diploid individuals/population technically; weak identifiability
preferred_samples: >=10-20 unrelated diploids/population and many independent neutral loci; balanced populations, replicate optimization/bootstrap
exact_input_representation: Folded or unfolded one-/multi-population SFS from exact-reference filtered VCF/BCF, common callability/ascertainment mask, sample assignments and projection settings
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Accurate population genotypes and invariant denominator; depth/error/batch QC; linked sites thinned or composite-likelihood uncertainty corrected
reference_identity_and_masks: Exact reference, allele coding and common callable sites; outgroup/reference compatibility if unfolded
phasing_and_polarization: Phasing not required for SFS; ancestral polarization required only for unfolded SFS, with mispolarization model
recombination_mutation_assumptions: User-specified parametric demography; Wright-Fisher/diffusion or moments approximation; mutation scaling, neutrality, independence/composite likelihood, no unmodeled structure/gene flow
primary_estimand: Model-specific theta, relative sizes, times and migration/split parameters; identifiability is conditional on candidate model
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Retain theta and time/migration in native scale; absolute Ne/time requires mu, diploid convention and g; model selection and parameter uncertainty propagated
time_window_resolution: Broad but smoothed/model-dependent; recent and ancient identifiability depends on sample size, rare variants, polarization and model
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 8-32 CPU, 16-128 GiB, 2-72 h per model/replicate; 50-500 optimization starts/bootstrap replicates; 20-200 GiB scratch and 1-20 GiB persistent
software_guix_provenance: Pinned dadi or moments release/commit, Python numerical stack and bcftools in separate Guix manifest; record model code hash, bounds, seeds and optimizer traces
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Nonidentifiability; local optima; linked selection; ascertainment; missing invariants; population mixture; wrong model; polarization error; scaling uncertainty
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: 0 frozen vertebrate inference-ready SFS tuples locally
planning_eligible_range: Pilot 3-5 species; reviewed wave 6-12 after model/power review
independence_from_pi_response: No when derived from same SFS/pi sites or cohort as response
allowed_role: Descriptive/model-validation/sensitivity tier only for shared data; independent only with a genuinely separate dataset and prespecified model

biological_sampling_unit: Multiple independent orthologous neutral loci sampled from multiple individuals per species/population, with outgroups and a species-tree hypothesis
minimum_samples: 2 sequences/species across multiple loci is technically possible
preferred_samples: 4-10 alleles/species across hundreds-thousands recombination-independent loci; replicate individuals and loci
exact_input_representation: Per-locus alignments with no within-locus recombination, species/population map, ploidy/heredity scalars, locus-rate model, species tree or topology prior, outgroup where needed
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Validated orthology, no paralog collapse, locus-level masks/alignment QC; ascertainment and missing taxa recorded
reference_identity_and_masks: Ortholog/reference provenance per sequence; coordinates retained; no forced single-reference identity across species but locus homology must be audited
phasing_and_polarization: Haplotype/allele sequences required; phase ambiguity modeled or excluded; polarization depends on analysis, not always required
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Multispecies coalescent, no recombination within locus/free recombination among loci, clock/rate model, no or explicitly modeled migration/introgression; gene-tree/species-tree discordance modeled
primary_estimand: Branch/population theta and divergence tau; possibly species-tree posterior; not contemporary Ne
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Retain theta=4Ne*mu for diploid autosomes and tau in substitutions/site; absolute Ne/time requires locus mutation model, ploidy/heredity scalars, g and rate uncertainty
time_window_resolution: Ancestral branch-scale history; poor for very recent population change; resolution follows locus count, lineage sorting and species sampling
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: 8-64 CPU, 32-256 GiB, 24 h-weeks per clade/MCMC; 50-500 GiB scratch, 10-100 GiB persistent chains; inappropriate for a vertebrate-wide first pass
software_guix_provenance: Pinned BPP source/release and compiler in method-specific Guix manifest; record control file, priors, seeds, chains, convergence and source hashes
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Paralogy; recombination; introgression; wrong species assignment/tree; prior sensitivity; poor mixing; rate/ploidy errors; theta treated as contemporary Ne
planning_eligible_range: Truth pilot 1-2 small clades; no scale-out until convergence/orthology review; possible 2-4 clades
independence_from_pi_response: No when loci overlap or are selected from pi response data; theta is a genomic outcome even on separate loci
allowed_role: Small-clade descriptive ancestral context and validation, not primary predictor

biological_sampling_unit: Species or explicitly delimited population/ecoregion observed by ecological, survey, telemetry or curated life-history study
preferred_samples: Multiple independent records or interval estimates spanning response sampling date/geography
exact_input_representation: Published tables/databases or survey outputs with quoted definition, units, geography, dates, uncertainty, sample effort, taxon ID and original citation; no genomic input
raw_read_genotype_coverage_contract: Not applicable; record ecological sampling/measurement protocol and detection correction
reference_identity_and_masks: Join by accepted taxon concept plus population/geography/date; never by bare name alone
recombination_mutation_assumptions: Survey detectability/model assumptions; allometric trait definition; census is N_c, not Ne; range/density products require habitat/occupancy uncertainty and cannot silently become abundance
primary_estimand: N_c, mature-individual abundance, density, range/EOO/AOO, body mass, generation length, fecundity, longevity, reproductive mode, dispersal, mating system and related independent traits
scaled_output_and_absolute_conversion: Native units and uncertainty retained; transformations performed in analysis with Jacobian/measurement model; no conversion to Ne unless an explicit separately validated demographic model is the estimand
time_window_resolution: Measurement dates and life stage exactly as sourced; temporal overlap with pi sampling scored
compute_io_storage_pilot_budget: Metadata acquisition 1-4 CPU, <16 GiB, <8 h/batch, <10 GiB; manual curation dominates; licensed bulk sources require separate authorization
software_guix_provenance: Existing baseline Guix Python/R lineage may parse approved exports; add pinned phylogenetic/statistical packages in a reviewed manifest; source snapshots, licenses, hashes and retrieval dates mandatory
failure_modes_and_exclusions: Taxon synonym mismatch; regional value transferred to species; stale census; captive/domestic data; uncorrected detectability; range includes unsuitable habitat; unit/life-stage mismatch; imputed values presented as observed
current_verifiable_vertebrate_coverage: No completed vertebrate-wide join in repository; denominator is reported 714 catalog species pending frozen TSV; Bergeron et al. provides direct mutation-rate candidates for 68 vertebrates
planning_eligible_range: Pilot 30-50 species; primary analysis target 100-300 provenance-complete vertebrates; report realized overlap, never silently impute to 714
independence_from_pi_response: Yes when gathered independently of pi and selection into dataset is not conditioned on pi
allowed_role: Primary predictor tier; claims are comparative associations with phylogenetic and measurement uncertainty, not proof of causal Ne
